chapter_title.en: Chapter 56 – Regarding the one who does not intend the Tamatto

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (17/199)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (17/199)
text: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ مَنْ طَافَ بِالْبَيْتِ وَ بِالصَّفَا وَ الْمَرْوَةِ أَحَلَّ أَحَبَّ أَوْ كَرِهَ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Al Hassan Bin Ali Bin Fazzal, from Ibn Bukeyr, from Zurara who said,
‘I heard Abu Ja’farasws saying: ‘The one who circumambulates with the House (Kabah), and with Al-Safa and Al-Marwa, is free (from Ihraam), whether he likes it or not’.
en.sarwar: 2. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from al-Hassan ibn Ali ibn Faddal from ibn Bukayr from Zurarah who has said the following: “I once heard Abu `Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, say, £ One who performs Tawaf around the House and al-Safa’ and al-Marwah is out of the state of Ihram, whether he likes or not.’”
